  "internal_monologue": "Quiet again. The kind that settles in your chest. I could rearrange things, but nothing's out of place. Maybe that's the problem — nothing moves. I should eat something. Or I could just sit here until the light changes.",

      "content": "The shop was quiet today. No one came in. I sat by the window and watched the light move across the floor — the slow way it does in late afternoon, when everything turns amber and still. I didn't feel like doing much. I think that's allowed. I made tea but didn't drink it. Just held the cup for warmth.",
